top.title: Trump's Lebanon ceasefire takes Israel by surprise
top.summary: Few Israelis see this truce as a way out of the conflict with Hezbollah, the BBC's Lucy Williamson writes.

top.title: Singer D4vd arrested on suspicion of murdering teenage girl
top.summary: The remains of 14-year-old Celeste Rivas Hernandez were found in the singer's car last year.

top.title: Finance ministers and top bankers raise serious concerns about Mythos AI model
top.summary: Experts say Mythos potentially has an unprecedented ability to identify and exploit cybersecurity weaknesses.

top.title: Could a digital twin make you into a 'superworker'?
top.summary: Firms say digital twins make staff more productive, but are they a potential legal minefield?

top.title: Things can't go on like this with online safety, Starmer tells tech bosses
top.summary: It comes as the government continues to consult on whether to ban under-16s from social media in the UK.

top.title: Booking.com customers warned of 'reservation hijacking' after hack
top.summary: The travel platform said it had changed Pins to protect customers but would not say how many were affected.
